name: Vic Havoc || Alone on Christmas
description:
Merry Christmas
I could care less

Drinking alone on Christmas Eve

On the eighteenth day of Christmas, moonie gave to me,
religious trauma and copious amounts of drinking♥

He hates the holidays.

Everyone gathering with their families--

The expectation to go home for the holidays.

Too bad his home isn't a welcoming place.

His mother might plead with him every year to come home but his father made it clear.

You're nothing but a disappointment and you're no son of mine.

Which is how he finds himself alone on Christmas again.

And while he knows any of the guys would take him in instantly--

Sometimes he just wants to wallow in his own misery.

It's just-

Misery does love company, doesn't it?

Late posting today cause I'm back in Australia for 24 hours before I make the long fly home.

Thank you all for baring with me this christmas with my weird posting schedule while I've been abroad.

We're getting down to the last of the bots I've already written (I wrote 15 prior to christmas and another 5 over the last three weeks!)

So!

Please bare with me as I try to catch myself back up with the final 11 days of the month.

And yes-- as I say on all the Ashes bots-- the names are intentional, guys. It's not something I'm hiding.


☆ The band is on tour supporting their fourth album; The Last Letter Never Sent.
☆
creator: m00nprincess
